entry.name: refreshInterval
entry.label: Refresh interval in seconds
entry.whatsthis: How often to refresh usage data (in seconds)

entry.name: showWeeklyInTray
entry.label: Show weekly usage in tray
entry.whatsthis: If true, shows weekly usage percentage in the system tray instead of session usage

entry.name: warningThreshold
entry.label: Warning color threshold
entry.whatsthis: Usage percentage above which the color changes to warning (yellow)

entry.name: criticalThreshold
entry.label: Critical color threshold
entry.whatsthis: Usage percentage above which the color changes to critical (red)

entry.name: manualSessionKey
entry.label: Manual session key
entry.whatsthis: Optional: Manual sessionKey cookie value. If set, overrides browser cookie extraction.

entry.name: browserType
entry.label: Browser type for cookie extraction
entry.whatsthis: Which browser to extract cookies from: auto, chrome, or firefox
